prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: db_2344 Product Type: KNIFE Brand (from catalog): ASR Tactical Existing Title: ASR Tactical Ferro Fire MultiFunction Drop Point Serrated Knife Description: The ASR Tactical Convert Multi Tool 6 in 1 Knife with Fire Starter is the all in one multi tool for people who love the outdoors.

Developed and designed to fit all the essentials for surviving in an emergency situation, The Convert Multi Tool opens bottles, provides light, starts fire, breaks windows, and cuts seat belts in an emergency situation. Don't leave home without one.

The LED mini light and fire starter are magnetically attached for easy use. To activate the mini light, unscrew the two pieces and remove the battery. Remove the film over the batter and twist light back together.
The light is activated by tightening the pieces together!


Package Includes:
-(1) ASR Tactical Drop Point Knife Search Terms: best hunting knife Features: - Overall length: 8.5" | Blade: 3.5" - Blade Material: 440 stainless steel with integrated bottle opener - 6-in-1 Multi-tool - Ferro rod fire starter - Detachable magnetic LED mini light (battery included) === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}
